name: @apeiris/modelverifier-ai
description: AI Model & System Assurance Control Matrix — modelverifier.ai. 54 controls across 6 layers (LI, TG, EV, OA, BH, CR). Zero runtime deps; static HTML on Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:schema && npm run validate:namespaces && npm run validate:sources && npm run validate:source-versions && npm run validate:licenses
scripts.audit: npm run audit:mappings && npm run audit:applicability && npm run audit:legal-status && npm run audit:control-overlap && npm run audit:cross-domain && npm run audit:evidence-contracts
scripts.ci: npm run validate && npm run audit && npm run check:freshness && npm run build:integration && npm run sign:release-manifest
